title: Mixed-effects Models
summary: Statistical models that account for both fixed and random effects in the data. It sits inside Statistical Models / Hierarchical Models. Compare it with Generalized Linear Mixed Models (GLMMs) and Voting Classifier. It opens into Linear Mixed-Effects Models.
